heroSubtitle: This is a demo showing how your restaurant menu could look. All items, prices, and branding are customizable.
about: This demo showcases TCC Menus features: QR access, AI assistant, ordering, and kitchen display. Your actual menu will be fully customized to your restaurant.
specials: Fettuccine Bolognese • Tiramisu • Prosciutto & Arugula Pizza

categoryIntros.Signature Dishes: Your signature items would be featured here.
categoryIntros.Pasta: Fresh pasta made daily, paired with authentic Italian sauces.
categoryIntros.Pizza: Wood-fired pizzas with San Marzano tomatoes and imported cheeses.
categoryIntros.Beverages: Refreshing drinks to complement your meal.
